seoTitle: Cloudflare Email Setup: Free Email Routing for Beginners
metaDescription: Learn how to create a custom domain email address for free using Cloudflare Email Routing, including DNS setup and forwarding to Gmail or Outlook.
intro: Cloudflare's free Email Routing feature lets you create a custom email address on your own domain and forward it straight to an inbox you already use, like Gmail or Outlook, without paying for a separate email service. This beginner-friendly guide covers setting up the DNS records correctly and avoiding common deliverability issues. It's built for small business owners, bloggers, and anyone launching a website who wants a professional-looking email address.

steps.heading: Create a custom email address on your domain
steps.body: Inside Cloudflare, set up Email Routing to define a custom address using your own domain name instead of a generic email provider.

steps.heading: Forward emails to your existing inbox
steps.body: Point your new custom address to forward incoming mail to Gmail, Outlook, or any inbox you already check, so you don't need to manage a separate mailbox.

steps.heading: Set up the required DNS records
steps.body: Cloudflare needs specific DNS records added correctly for routing to work, so this step ensures mail actually reaches your forwarding address.

steps.heading: Apply tips to avoid spam and improve deliverability
steps.body: Following recommended settings helps keep your forwarded mail out of spam folders and improves overall deliverability for your custom domain email.

faq.question: Is Cloudflare Email Routing really free?
faq.answer: Yes, Cloudflare's Email Routing feature is free to use and lets you forward custom domain emails without a paid third-party email service.

faq.question: Can I forward Cloudflare email to Gmail?
faq.answer: Yes, you can forward incoming mail from your custom domain address to Gmail, Outlook, or any inbox you already use.

faq.question: Do I need to change my DNS settings for this to work?
faq.answer: Yes, setting up the correct DNS records is a required step for Cloudflare Email Routing to properly deliver mail to your forwarding address.

faq.question: Will my forwarded emails end up in spam?
faq.answer: Following the recommended DNS and configuration tips helps reduce the chance of forwarded mail being flagged as spam.

faq.question: Is this suitable for someone with no technical experience?
faq.answer: Yes, this is described as a beginner-friendly setup aimed at small website owners and first-time users of email routing.
